title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 640.600 - Grants in aid to certain public water supply sewer systems
text:
640.600.  Grants in aid to certain public water supply sewer systems. — The state of Missouri may make direct grants to aid in the financing of any public water supply district, any sewer districts, any rural community water or sewer systems legally organized in the state or any municipal sewer system in any city, town, or village.
(L. 1989 S.B. 444) 
Effective 6-06-89
